mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO eval_record_item (record_id, indicator_id, score, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.recordId}, #{item.indicatorId}, #{item.score}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT eri.id, eri.record_id AS recordId, eri.indicator_id AS indicatorId, ei.indicator_name AS indicatorName, ei.weight, eri.score FROM eval_record_item eri LEFT JOIN eval_indicator ei ON ei.id = eri.indicator_id WHERE eri.record_id = #{recordId} ORDER BY eri.id ASC

SELECT eri.indicator_id AS indicatorId, ei.indicator_name AS indicatorName, ROUND(AVG(eri.score), 2) AS avgScore FROM eval_record_item eri LEFT JOIN eval_record er ON er.id = eri.record_id LEFT JOIN eval_indicator ei ON ei.id = eri.indicator_id WHERE er.task_id = #{taskId} GROUP BY eri.indicator_id ORDER BY indicatorId ASC
